content:
Many English-speaking players have been closely following our localization progress, and we feel a strong sense of responsibility because of this. Today, I’d like to update everyone on our recent progress and the adjustments we plan to make going forward.

After some time working on localization, we’ve realized that giving translation enough time for careful editing and refinement would require the original content to be finalized much earlier in advance. Given that we still occasionally experience delays in content development, this isn’t realistic at present. Trying to work on new chapter translations and improvements to the old main story at the same time has proven difficult and has caused us to fall short in both areas.

For example, up until now, our updates to the first three chapters have mostly focused on correcting basic pronoun errors—this clearly hasn’t met everyone’s expectations. We sincerely apologize for this, and we recognize that we underestimated the challenge of delivering high-quality localization. It’s clear that we need to make a change.

After careful discussion, and in order to achieve more stable and higher quality English localization in the future, we’ve decided to adjust our priorities. Instead of prioritizing new events and new main story chapters, we will now focus on improving the existing main story translation. At the same time, our localization quality standards will be raised from simple proofreading to delivering the very best quality we can achieve. We would rather slow down our pace if it means providing everyone with a better localization experience.

Thank you all for your patience and ongoing support. We’ll continue striving to improve and deliver even better stories for everyone!
thread_title: 校猫碎碎念#Translation Plan Update 本地化计划变更
